title: Anne of Avonlea
description: Anne of Avonlea — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "Anne of Avonlea" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: 'Table of Contents'
memes.description: 'Table of Contents'

memes.label: Ambition
memes.description: The driving force of personal aspiration that shapes the life trajectories of Anne Shirley, Gilbert Blythe, and other characters — a quality Montgomery treats as noble when tempered by duty and dangerous when untethered from community

memes.label: Anne Shirley
memes.description: The protagonist of Anne of Avonlea — a young teacher with a boundless imagination, a gift for friendship, and a growing sense of duty to her Avonlea community

memes.label: Annetta Bell
memes.description: A pupil at Avonlea School, one of the children who populate Anne Shirley's classroom and contribute to the daily texture of school life.

memes.label: Anthony Pye
memes.description: The defiant pupil who becomes Anne Shirley's most difficult teaching challenge — a boy whose resistance to kindness tests Anne's educational philosophy and whose eventual transformation vindicates it

memes.label: Aunt Josephine
memes.description: Diana Barry's wealthy and formidable great-aunt, whose visits to Orchard Slope occasion both social anxiety and Anne's best efforts at entertainment.

memes.label: Founding of the A.V.I.S.
memes.description: The founding of the Avonlea Village Improvement Society — Anne Shirley's initiative to channel community energy into the beautification and improvement of Avonlea

memes.label: Avonlea
memes.description: The small rural community on Prince Edward Island that is the setting of Anne of Avonlea — a village whose inhabitants, landscapes, and social dynamics form the complete world of the novel

memes.label: Avonlea Presbyterian Church
memes.description: The Presbyterian church of Avonlea — the spiritual and social center of the community, served by Mr. and Mrs. Allan, and a key institution in the village's moral life

memes.label: Avonlea School
memes.description: The one-room schoolhouse where Anne Shirley teaches — the primary setting for her professional life and the crucible in which her educational philosophy is tested

memes.label: Avonlea Village Improvement Society
memes.description: The civic organization founded by Anne Shirley and friends to beautify and improve the village of Avonlea — a vehicle for community engagement, comic mishap, and Anne's growing sense of social responsibility

memes.label: Barbara Shaw
memes.description: A pupil at Avonlea School whose behavior in class tests Anne Shirley's patience and teaching skills.

memes.label: Barry Family
memes.description: Prominent Avonlea family residing at Orchard Slope, close friends and neighbors of the Cuthberts at Green Gables.

memes.label: Beauty
memes.description: The aesthetic sensibility that drives Anne Shirley to seek, create, and celebrate beauty in the natural world, in human relationships, and in everyday life

memes.label: Belonging
memes.description: The sense of being rooted in a place and community, a central theme in Anne Shirley's journey from orphan to beloved community member.

memes.label: Birch Path
memes.description: A beloved path through the woods near Green Gables — one of Anne Shirley's favorite haunts, named by her imagination and cherished for its beauty and solitude

memes.label: Bright River
memes.description: A settlement with a railway station near Avonlea, home to a station agent whose son appears briefly in the novel.

memes.label: Carmody
memes.description: A neighboring community to Avonlea — frequently mentioned as a point of comparison and occasional destination, known for its own share of village gossip

memes.label: All Characters
memes.description: Complete index of all characters appearing in Anne of Avonlea, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: Charlie Sloane
memes.description: A young man of Avonlea, known for literary aspirations and regarded by village gossip as Gilbert Blythe's rival for Anne Shirley's affection.

memes.label: Charlotta the Fourth
memes.description: Miss Lavendar Lewis's devoted and comically enthusiastic maid at Echo Lodge — a minor character whose "very widest smile" and fierce loyalty make her one of Montgomery's most delightful comic creations

memes.label: Charlottetown
memes.description: The provincial capital of Prince Edward Island, referenced throughout the novel as a center of commerce, culture, and opportunity beyond Avonlea.

memes.label: Community
memes.description: The network of relationships and shared life that defines Avonlea as more than a geographical place in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: All Concepts
memes.description: Complete index of all thematic concepts explored in the Anne of Avonlea wiki.

memes.label: Courage
memes.description: The moral and emotional strength to face difficulty, opposition, or fear in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Davy Keith
memes.description: One of the orphaned twins taken in by Marilla Cuthbert — a mischievous, affectionate boy whose endless scrapes test Anne's patience and whose loving heart makes him impossible not to forgive

memes.label: Death
memes.description: A recurring thematic undercurrent in Anne of Avonlea — the awareness of mortality that gives depth to the novel's celebration of life, love, and community.

memes.label: Despair
memes.description: The emotional low point that characters in Anne of Avonlea periodically reach and overcome, serving as the shadow against which hope and resilience are defined

memes.label: Diana Barry
memes.description: Anne Shirley's dearest "bosom friend" since girlhood — a loyal, beautiful, and conventionally-minded young woman whose romantic journey marks one of the novel's key emotional arcs

memes.label: Dora Keith
memes.description: The prim, well-behaved twin sister of Davy Keith — a child whose perfect obedience provides comic contrast to her brother's endless mischief and whose quiet goodness is its own form of virtue

memes.label: Duty
memes.description: The moral framework of obligation and responsibility that guides Anne Shirley's actions as teacher, guardian, and community member in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Echo Lodge
memes.description: The charming stone house near Avonlea where Miss Lavendar Lewis lives — a setting of romance, beauty, and the novel's most tender love story

memes.label: Education
memes.description: The formal and informal processes of learning that shape characters' lives in Anne of Avonlea — from Anne's own continuing studies to her pupils' development and the broader question of what it means to be educated

memes.label: Envy
memes.description: The yearning for what another possesses — treated with gentle sympathy in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Faith
memes.description: The quality of steadfast trust and loyalty — in others, in oneself, and in life itself — that underpins the strongest relationships in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Featured Pages
memes.description: Curated list of the wiki's highest-quality pages — flagship content hand-picked for excellence.

memes.label: Forgiveness
memes.description: The moral act of releasing resentment and restoring relationship — a virtue that proves essential to the happiness of multiple characters in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Fred Wright
memes.description: An Avonlea schoolboy who served as vice-president of the Improvement Society and accompanied Anne to social events.

memes.label: Friendship
memes.description: The deep bonds of affection and mutual understanding that sustain Anne Shirley and the other characters of Avonlea, celebrated as one of life's greatest gifts

memes.label: "Anne of Avonlea — Front Matter"
memes.description: "前置内容 of Anne of Avonlea by L. M. Montgomery"

memes.label: Generosity
memes.description: The quality of giving freely without expectation of return in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Generous
memes.description: The quality of giving freely — whether of food, time, or spirit — explored through acts of hospitality and their absence in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Gertie Pye
memes.description: A schoolgirl of Avonlea, one of the Pye sisters, known for her pompadour hairstyle and participation in the Village Improvement Society.

memes.label: Gilbert Blythe
memes.description: Anne Shirley's intellectual equal, fellow teacher, and future partner — a steady, ambitious young man whose quiet support and shared values form the foundation of one of literature's most beloved slow-burn romances

memes.label: Gossip
memes.description: The circulating currency of village talk in Avonlea — a social force that both binds the community together and threatens individual reputations, treated by Montgomery with comic exasperation and clear-eyed realism

memes.label: Grafton
memes.description: A neighboring community near Avonlea, subdivided into East, West, and Middle Grafton, home to several characters with ties to Avonlea.

memes.label: Gratitude
memes.description: The quality of being thankful and ready to show appreciation for kindness — a virtue that Marilla Cuthbert embodies and Anne Shirley learns to practice as a conscious discipline of happiness

memes.label: Green Gables
memes.description: The Cuthbert family farm in Avonlea, Prince Edward Island — Anne Shirley's beloved home, the setting of her girlhood and young womanhood, and one of the most famous fictional houses in children's literature

memes.label: Haunted Wood
memes.description: A small wood between Green Gables and Orchard Slope, invested with eerie significance by Anne Shirley's childhood imagination and a recurring pathway in the Avonlea landscape.

memes.label: Hester Gray
memes.description: A young woman who lived and died in the Avonlea area before the events of the novel, remembered through her garden and her story.

memes.label: Hope
memes.description: The optimistic forward-looking sensibility that sustains characters through hardship and disappointment in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Humor
memes.description: The comic sensibility that lightens the narrative and reveals character in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Imagination
memes.description: The central imaginative faculty that defines Anne Shirley's worldview, shapes her relationships, and transforms ordinary Avonlea life into a realm of beauty and possibility

memes.label: Jane Andrews
memes.description: A pupil at Avonlea School whose modest ambition and steady contentment represent an alternative to Anne Shirley's restless striving — a minor character who embodies the novel's respect for lives of quiet satisfaction

memes.label: Jealousy
memes.description: The small but corrosive social emotion — "the small jealousies, the little deceits and rivalries" (027-122) — that Montgomery presents as an obstacle to genuine community and personal growth

memes.label: Jerry Corcoran
memes.description: A Newbridge man involved in local political disputes around election time.

memes.label: Joy
memes.description: The capacity for spontaneous happiness that defines Anne Shirley's approach to life — a quality Montgomery presents as both a natural gift and a moral achievement, distinct from mere pleasure in its depth and resilience

memes.label: Judson Parker
memes.description: A farmer and Avonlea resident whose land stands in the way of the A.V.I.S. road improvement plan.

memes.label: Justice
memes.description: The principle of fairness and right-dealing — both in the literal sense of giving each their due and the broader sense of moral rightness — in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Kindness
memes.description: The quality of gentle goodwill that Anne Shirley practices as a teacher and neighbor — presented in Anne of Avonlea as a practical philosophy with the power to transform relationships and build community

memes.label: Kindred Spirits
memes.description: The uniquely Anne-ish concept of a spiritual affinity between two people who recognize each other as belonging to the same imaginative and emotional world — the deepest form of friendship in Montgomery's universe

memes.label: Lake of Shining Waters
memes.description: A small lake near Avonlea, named by Anne Shirley — "known to unimaginative people as Barry's Pond" — representing the triumph of poetic vision over prosaic nomenclature.

memes.label: Laughter
memes.description: The spontaneous expression of joy and shared mirth that pervades Anne of Avonlea as both character trait and communal bond

memes.label: Lauretta White
memes.description: A plump, placid eight-year-old girl of White Sands, whose composure in church is memorably shattered by Davy Keith's caterpillar.

memes.label: Loneliness
memes.description: The experience of being alone or feeling disconnected — a recurring emotional state in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Lorenzo White
memes.description: A notoriously stingy farmer of White Sands who, in a moment of new-father pride, makes the largest subscription to the Avonlea Village Improvement Society — and never subscribes to anything again.

memes.label: Love
memes.description: A central thematic force in Anne of Avonlea — encompassing romantic love, friendship, kindness, and the affection that binds the Avonlea community.

memes.label: Marilla Cuthbert
memes.description: Anne Shirley's adoptive mother — a stern, practical woman whose hidden tenderness and steadfast love provide the moral foundation of Anne's life at Green Gables

memes.label: Martin
memes.description: An unreliable hired hand on the Cuthbert farm, whose departure to "see the carnival" leaves Marilla short-handed and prompts the search for help.

memes.label: Mary Joe
memes.description: Young helper at the Irving household who assists with Paul Irving and features in Davy's comedic exploits.

memes.label: Minnie May
memes.description: Diana Barry's younger sister, a curious and talkative child in Avonlea.

memes.label: Minnie May Barry
memes.description: The youngest daughter of the Barry family and Diana Barry's little sister, a schoolchild in Avonlea.

memes.label: Mirabel Cotton
memes.description: A ten-year-old Avonlea schoolgirl, known for an infamous uncle who becomes the subject of childhood fears.

memes.label: Miss Lavendar
memes.description: A romantic, dreamy spinster who lives in a stone house at Echo Lodge, whose lost love returns after twenty-five years.

memes.label: Miss Lavendar Lewis
memes.description: The romantic heroine of Anne of Avonlea's central love story — a middle-aged woman who has preserved the freshness of youth in her heart and whose long-delayed reunion with Stephen Irving is the novel's most tender affirmation of love's endurance

memes.label: Miss Lavendar's Wedding
memes.description: The wedding of Miss Lavendar Lewis and Stephen Irving at Echo Lodge — the culminating event of the novel's central romance plot, affirming that love can triumph after decades of separation

memes.label: Miss Stacy
memes.description: A progressive Avonlea schoolteacher known for her gentle discipline methods and encouragement of students.

memes.label: Most Referenced Pages
memes.description: Statistical ranking of the most cross-referenced pages in the Anne of Avonlea wiki.

memes.label: Mr. Allan
memes.description: The Presbyterian minister of Avonlea, husband of Mrs. Allan, whose spiritual leadership and eventual departure to Charlottetown are significant plot points.

memes.label: Mr. Barry
memes.description: Diana Barry's father and a respected Avonlea farmer, known for his practical wisdom and steady temperament.

memes.label: Mr. Bell
memes.description: A neighbor of Green Gables whose pasture lies beyond the Haunted Wood, known as a seller of livestock and a farmer whose sermons are occasionally of dubious length.

memes.label: Mr. Harmon Andrews
memes.description: A respected Avonlea farmer who hosted the Village Improvement Society and offered advice to Jane Andrews.

memes.label: Mr. Harrison
memes.description: Anne Shirley's irascible neighbor whose initial misanthropy conceals a kind heart — his gradual integration into Avonlea community life is one of the novel's quiet comedies of transformation

memes.label: Mr. Spencer
memes.description: A respected Avonlea farmer whose good example in agricultural improvement inspires other farmers to follow suit.

memes.label: Mrs. Allan
memes.description: The minister's wife whose gentle wisdom and genuine friendship provide Anne Shirley with a model of adult womanhood that harmonizes imagination with duty, and romance with community

memes.label: Mrs. Bell
memes.description: An Avonlea church member engaged in the village's ecclesiastical news network, known for her commentary on ministers and college plans.

memes.label: Mrs. Harmon Andrews
memes.description: The mother of Jane Andrews, a prominent Avonlea matron known for her strong opinions on propriety and her participation in local social circles and gossip.

memes.label: Mrs. Harrison
memes.description: The wife of Mr. Harrison, a warm and welcoming neighbor who befriends Anne Shirley.

memes.label: Mrs. Irving
memes.description: Paul Irving's grandmother, who lives on the shore road near Avonlea and raises her grandson with a blend of strictness and affection.

memes.label: Mrs. Lynde
memes.description: Green Gables' formidable neighbor and Avonlea's most indefatigable news-gatherer, whose opinions shape village opinion.

memes.label: Mrs. Rachel Lynde
memes.description: An outspoken Avonlea neighbor and close friend of Marilla Cuthbert, known for her strong opinions and kind heart.

memes.label: Mrs. Theodore White
memes.description: A resident of Avonlea renowned as "the neatest woman" in the community, who receives Anne and Diana during their subscription canvassing for the Village Improvement Society

memes.label: Nature Appreciation
memes.description: Anne Shirley's deep, almost spiritual relationship with the natural world — a source of solace, inspiration, and moral clarity throughout Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Neighbor
memes.description: The social bond of proximity — both its obligations and its frictions — as explored through the residents of Avonlea

memes.label: Newbridge
memes.description: A rural settlement and school district adjacent to Avonlea, frequently mentioned as a neighboring community and the former home of several Avonlea residents.

memes.label: Oliver Sloane
memes.description: An active member of the Avonlea Village Improvement Society and a participant in community affairs, known for his practical suggestions and candid opinions.

memes.label: Orchard Slope
memes.description: The Barry family farm in Avonlea, home to Diana Barry, and the second most important domestic setting in Anne Shirley's world after Green Gables.

memes.label: Patience
memes.description: A recurring virtue in Anne of Avonlea, tested through teaching, child-rearing, and waiting for love.

memes.label: Paul Irving
memes.description: Anne Shirley's most beloved pupil — a sensitive, imaginative boy who shares Anne's visionary capacity and becomes her youngest "kindred spirit"

memes.label: Peter Sloane
memes.description: An Avonlea landowner and magistrate, whose old house becomes the Harrison residence and whose judicial role serves the local community.

memes.label: All Places
memes.description: Complete index of all locations in Anne of Avonlea, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: Pride
memes.description: The double-edged moral quality that can manifest as proper self-respect or destructive stubbornness — examined through multiple characters in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Prince Edward Island
memes.description: The Canadian maritime province that serves as the primary setting of the Anne of Avonlea narrative, encompassing Avonlea and surrounding communities.

memes.label: Priscilla Grant
memes.description: A young woman from Avonlea who secures the Carmody school position and reappears in Anne's life during a visit to Echo Lodge.

memes.label: Rachel Lynde
memes.description: Avonlea's most formidable and opinionated resident — a neighbor whose sharp tongue, conviction of her own rightness, and unexpected kindness make her one of Montgomery's most memorable supporting characters

memes.label: Redmond College
memes.description: The college in Kingsport where Anne Shirley and Gilbert Blythe plan to continue their education, representing the promise of intellectual life beyond Avonlea.

memes.label: Regret
memes.description: The wistful awareness of loss and the reflective acknowledgment of past mistakes in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Romance
memes.description: The experience of romantic love as it touches the lives of characters in Anne of Avonlea — from youthful infatuation to mature devotion and long-delayed reunion

memes.label: Ruby Gillis
memes.description: An Avonlea schoolgirl and contemporary of Anne Shirley's, known for her romantic entanglements and her bid for the Carmody school.

memes.label: Sacrifice
memes.description: The act of giving up something valued for the sake of others or a higher principle in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Sloane Family
memes.description: Prolific Avonlea family with multiple homesteads, active in village affairs and the Improvement Society.

memes.label: Spencervale
memes.description: A rural settlement ten miles from Avonlea, reached by Anne and Diana on a day's expedition in search of a blue platter for Marilla.

memes.label: Stephen Irving
memes.description: Paul Irving's father and the hero of the novel's central romance — a man whose twenty-five-year fidelity to the memory of his lost love is rewarded when fate, Anne Shirley, and his own son conspire to reunite him with Miss Lavendar Lewis

memes.label: Teaching
memes.description: Anne Shirley's vocation as a teacher in Avonlea — her philosophy, methods, challenges, and the transformative role of education in the novel's vision of community

memes.label: Tennyson's Poems
memes.description: The poetry of Alfred, Lord Tennyson — frequently quoted and alluded to in Anne of Avonlea as a touchstone of romantic sensibility and literary culture

memes.label: The Catechism
memes.description: The Presbyterian catechism studied by Avonlea children, particularly Davy Keith, whose literal interpretations of its doctrines provide comic and theological insight throughout the novel.

memes.label: The Picnic
memes.description: A series of community picnics in Anne of Avonlea, including the A.V.I.S. picnic and the memorable shore picnic, that showcase Avonlea's social life and Anne's evolving relationships.

memes.label: The Storm
memes.description: A violent thunderstorm that strikes Avonlea, testing Anne's teaching resolve and revealing character under pressure.

memes.label: The Sunday School
memes.description: The Sunday school program at Avonlea Presbyterian Church, an important institution for children's religious and moral education in the village community.

memes.label: Thomas Lynde
memes.description: The quiet, unassuming husband of Rachel Lynde, whose gentle passing prompts reflection on a life lived without "will power."

memes.label: Tradition
memes.description: The inherited patterns of behavior and belief that shape Avonlea life — and the quiet rebellion against them in Anne of Avonlea

memes.label: Uncle Abe
memes.description: Avonlea's eccentric weather prophet whose predictions, often wrong, become the talk of the village.

memes.label: Violet Vale
memes.description: A fern-scented vale in Avonlea, named by Anne Shirley, that appears as a recurring emblem of natural beauty in the landscape of Anne of Avonlea.

memes.label: Wesley Keyson
memes.description: A resident of Spencervale whose home serves as a social gathering place.

memes.label: White Sands
memes.description: A nearby community on Prince Edward Island — one of the settlements that, together with Avonlea and Carmody, forms the geographic network of the novel

memes.label: White Sands Road
memes.description: A road branching from Avonlea toward the settlement of White Sands, assigned to Gilbert Blythe and Fred Wright for A.V.I.S. canvassing, and notable as the route to Lorenzo White's farm.

memes.label: Willowmere
memes.description: A dark, romantic spruce wood near Avonlea, frequently traversed by Anne Shirley on her walks through Violet Vale.

memes.label: Wisdom
memes.description: The capacity for sound judgment and deep understanding, whether innate or learned, in Anne of Avonlea
